'''Talu''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Zsinj's Empire|Zsinj space]] where [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] executed the [[Talu insertion mission]] during the [[Hunt for Zsinj|hunt]] for [[Zsinj]].{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
